name: Herring Stir-Fry (Marguerite Patten)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ask the fishmonger to bone and fillet the herrings. Cut the fillets into slices.
2. Finely chop the ginger. Cut the carrot, onion, broccoli, and cauliflower into thin sticks or small florets.
3. Heat the oil in a large frying pan or wok over medium heat.
4. Stir-fry the ginger for about 1 minute until fragrant.
5. Add the vegetable pieces (carrot, onion, broccoli, cauliflower) and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
6. Add the herring slices to the pan and cook for a further 3 to 4 minutes, stirring gently so the fish remains in uniform thin strips without breaking.
7. Just before serving, add the lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Sprinkle with the lemon rind.
9. Serve hot over noodles or rice.
